title: anisochilus velutinus
intro: Anisochilus velutinus, also known as the hairy anise tree, is a plant species within the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Anisochilus velutinus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Anisochilus velutinus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and can also be found in various traditional medicines in the form of extracts and tinctures.
